name: read_file
description: Read the complete contents of a file from the filesystem.

name: write_file
description: Create a new file or overwrite an existing file with new content.

name: list_directory
description: List the names of all files and subdirectories in a given directory path.

name: create_directory
description: Create a new directory at the given path. Creates intermediate parents.

name: move_file
description: Move or rename a file or directory.

name: search_files
description: Recursively search for files matching a pattern within a directory.

name: get_file_info
description: Retrieve metadata (size, modified time, permissions) for a file.

name: delete_file
description: Permanently delete a file from the filesystem.

name: list_allowed_directories
description: List directories the server is allowed to access.

name: create_or_update_file
description: Create or update a single file in a GitHub repository.

name: search_repositories
description: Search for GitHub repositories matching a query.

name: create_repository
description: Create a new GitHub repository in the authenticated user's account.

name: get_file_contents
description: Retrieve the contents of a file or directory from a GitHub repository.

name: create_issue
description: Create a new issue in a GitHub repository.

name: create_pull_request
description: Open a new pull request on a GitHub repository.

name: list_commits
description: List recent commits on a branch of a GitHub repository.

name: list_issues
description: List open issues for a GitHub repository.

name: update_issue
description: Update an existing GitHub issue (state, title, body, assignees).

name: add_issue_comment
description: Add a comment to a GitHub issue or pull request.

name: search_code
description: Search for code across GitHub repositories.

name: slack_list_channels
description: List public channels in the Slack workspace.

name: slack_post_message
description: Post a new message to a Slack channel.

name: slack_reply_to_thread
description: Reply to a specific thread in a Slack channel.

name: slack_add_reaction
description: Add a reaction emoji to a Slack message.

name: slack_get_channel_history
description: Retrieve recent message history for a Slack channel.

name: slack_get_thread_replies
description: Get all replies in a Slack thread.

name: slack_get_users
description: List users in the Slack workspace.

name: slack_get_user_profile
description: Get a Slack user's profile details.

name: git_diff
description: Show changes between the working tree and the index, or between commits.

name: git_log
description: Show commit logs for the current repository.
